name: TAPLA Premium Light
description: Светлый премиум — основной стиль TAPLA MARKETPLACE. Для большинства товаров: электроника, бытовая техника, аксессуары.

design_spec.background: Clean white-to-light-grey studio sweep, no patterns, no textures, subtle gradient from #FFFFFF to #F5F5F5
design_spec.lighting: Three-point studio lighting: key light from front-left (softbox), fill light from front-right (40% intensity), rim light from top-back. Soft shadows only under the product. No harsh shadows.
design_spec.color_palette: Product retains natural colors. Accent elements use TAPLA brand charcoal #2D2D2D with thin gold #C9A96E accent lines. Price badges: black background with white text.

typography.headlines: Bold geometric sans-serif (like Montserrat 700), 28-48pt, color #1A1A1A, uppercase for product names
typography.badges: Bold condensed, 12-16pt, white text on black pill background (#1A1A1A)
typography.prices: Bold, 24-36pt, color #1A1A1A, old price with red strikethrough

composition_rules.product_zone: Center 60% of frame, no overlap with text zones
composition_rules.text_zone: Top 15% for headline, bottom 15% for price/badges. Never block the product.

mandatory_elements: TAPLA logo bottom-right corner (small, 40px height, watermark opacity 30%)
forbidden: Fake shadows that don't match lighting
3D renders that look like plastic toys

text_rules.language: AZERBAIJANI LATIN ONLY. Never English. Never Russian. Never Cyrillic.
text_rules.tone: Professional, trustworthy, premium. Not pushy. Not cheap.
